ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: detto l`Affidato Accademico Illuminato. di nuovo corrette, et accresciute, e divise in Prima, Seconda, e Terza Parte. Dedicate al M. Illustre & Eccel. Sig[nor] Nicolo` Zarotti
ItacWorkItem.Notes: On the title page there may be the Academy`s emblem. But Zappella believes this is the Mariani`s ornament. For the background of this publication, see Franchi, Impressioni (1620), p. 508. Contrary to other editions, poems do not have titles.

Essay.EssayTitle: Del cavaliere Mariano Insegna detto l`Opaco al` Authore - Sonetto - Quando lo spirto tuo resto` disciolto

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
